title: Ralph Loop Optimization Pass
description: Phase 4 output — one iteration of the critique-simplify-improve cycle

critique.description: What is wrong or suboptimal in the current design.

simplify.description: What can be removed, collapsed, or merged without losing capability.

improve.description: Specific architectural or workflow changes to make.

delta.description: One sentence: what materially changed vs the previous pass.

resolved_ambiguity_defects.description: Items from failure-analysis.ambiguity_defects resolved in this pass.

open_items_added.description: New OPEN ITEMS surfaced during this pass that require human decision.
